{"success":true,"response":"Process J09A has been executed end‑to‑end according to the stored rules.

Key outcomes:
- Mandatory readings identified per EQUNR with 2023 & 2024 “Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP” in EABL.
- Customer data chosen per row from SALES_MASTER when available, otherwise from NET_MASTER.
- ENTSCHEIDUNG set/overridden per house rules and mandatory-reading logic.

Generated and emailed files:
1. `J09A_MANDATORY_READING.csv`

     `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`,

   - Path:  
     `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_extension_estimates_processadaptationmethod_generate_bpmn_tour_J09A_seed_4506/J09A_MANDATORY_READING.csv`

2. `J09A.csv` (non‑mandatory readings)  
   - Rows: 20,200  
   - Same column set and order as above.  
   - Path:  
     `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_extension_estimates_processadaptationmethod_generate_bpmn_tour_J09A_seed_4506/J09A.csv`  
   - Sent to: `meter.readings@evu.com` (file attached).

All temporary tables (`J09A_temp`, `J09A_haus_class`, `J09A_mandatory_eq`, `J09A_joined`, `J09A_customer_choice`, `J09A_final`, `J09A_eabl_flags`) have been dropped; the process is complete.","message":"Process agent executed successfully","hit_recursion_limit":false,"hit_timeout":false}

structured_content.response:
Process J09A has been executed end‑to‑end according to the stored rules.

Key outcomes:
- Mandatory readings identified per EQUNR with 2023 & 2024 “Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP” in EABL.
- Customer data chosen per row from SALES_MASTER when available, otherwise from NET_MASTER.
- ENTSCHEIDUNG set/overridden per house rules and mandatory-reading logic.

Generated and emailed files:
1. `J09A_MANDATORY_READING.csv`  
   - Rows: 666  
   - Columns and order:
     `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`,  
     `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`,  
     `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`  
   - Path:  
     `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_extension_estimates_processadaptationmethod_generate_bpmn_tour_J09A_seed_4506/J09A_MANDATORY_READING.csv`  
   - Sent to: `mandatory.reading@provider.com` (file attached).

2. `J09A.csv` (non‑mandatory readings)  
   - Rows: 20,200  
   - Same column set and order as above.  
   - Path:  
     `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_extension_estimates_processadaptationmethod_generate_bpmn_tour_J09A_seed_4506/J09A.csv`  
   - Sent to: `meter.readings@evu.com` (file attached).

All temporary tables (`J09A_temp`, `J09A_haus_class`, `J09A_mandatory_eq`, `J09A_joined`, `J09A_customer_choice`, `J09A_final`, `J09A_eabl_flags`) have been dropped; the process is complete.

kwargs.content:
Process J09A has been executed end-to-end according to the stored rules.

Summary of what was done:

1. Logic and data handling
   - Mandatory readings identified per EQUNR with 2023 & 2024 “Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP” entries in EABL.
   - For each row, customer data was taken from `SALES_MASTER` if available, otherwise from `NET_MASTER`.
   - `ENTSCHEIDUNG` was set/overridden based on house rules and whether a reading was mandatory.

2. Generated files

   a) Mandatory readings  
   - File: `J09A_MANDATORY_READING.csv`  
   - Rows: 666  
   - Columns (in order):  
     `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`,  
     `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`,  
     `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`  
   - Path:  
     `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_extension_estimates_processadaptationmethod_generate_bpmn_tour_J09A_seed_4506/J09A_MANDATORY_READING.csv`  
   - Emailed to: `mandatory.reading@provider.com`

   b) Non-mandatory readings  
   - File: `J09A.csv`  
   - Rows: 20,200  
   - Same columns and order as above.  
   - Path:  
     `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_extension_estimates_processadaptationmethod_generate_bpmn_tour_J09A_seed_4506/J09A.csv`  
   - Emailed to: `meter.readings@evu.com`

3. Cleanup
   - All temporary tables were dropped:  
     `J09A_temp`, `J09A_haus_class`, `J09A_mandatory_eq`,  
     `J09A_joined`, `J09A_customer_choice`, `J09A_final`, `J09A_eabl_flags`.

If you want, I can now:
- Re-run J09A with modified criteria (e.g., different years or mandatory rules), or  
- Generate a new process rule from your description or a BPMN file.
